sent_simp: 候车室里摆着几份书报供旅客阅读。
sent_trad: 候車室裡擺著幾份書報供旅客閱讀。
pinyin: Hòuchēshì lǐ bǎi zhe jǐ fèn shūbào gōng lǚkè yuèdú.
english: The waiting room has some books and newspapers for passengers to read.

sent_simp: 他反手就接住了从背后飞来的球。
sent_trad: 他反手就接住了從背後飛來的球。
pinyin: Tā fǎnshǒu jiù jiēzhù le cóng bèihòu fēilái de qiú.
english: He turned his hand and caught the ball that came flying from behind.

sent_simp: 装修费是这次预算中最贵的大项。
sent_trad: 裝修費是這次預算中最貴的大項。
pinyin: Zhuāngxiū fèi shì zhè cì yùsuàn zhōng zuì guì de dàxiàng.
english: Renovation costs are the most expensive main item in this budget.

sent_simp: 这台打印机可以联网共享使用。
sent_trad: 這台打印機可以聯網共享使用。
pinyin: Zhè tái dǎyìnjī kěyǐ liánwǎng gòngxiǎng shǐyòng.
english: This printer can be connected to the network for shared use.

sent_simp: 地铁里有专门供残疾人使用的通道。
sent_trad: 地鐵裡有專門供殘疾人使用的通道。
pinyin: Dìtiě lǐ yǒu zhuānmén gōng cánjírén shǐyòng de tōngdào.
english: The subway has dedicated passageways for people with disabilities.

sent_simp: 村里成立了一个农业合作社。
sent_trad: 村裡成立了一個農業合作社。
pinyin: Cūnlǐ chénglì le yī gè nóngyè hézuòshè.
english: An agricultural cooperative was set up in the village.

sent_simp: 她的厨艺好得了不得，每道菜都超好吃。
sent_trad: 她的廚藝好得了不得，每道菜都超好吃。
pinyin: Tā de chúyì hǎo de liǎobudé, měi dào cài dōu chāo hǎochī.
english: Her cooking skills are incredible — every dish is absolutely delicious.

sent_simp: 听到这首歌，我彷佛回到了童年。
sent_trad: 聽到這首歌，我彷佛回到了童年。
pinyin: Tīng dào zhè shǒu gē, wǒ fǎngfú huí dào le tóngnián.
english: Hearing this song, I felt as if I'd returned to my childhood.

sent_simp: 公司计划下半年推出新产品。
sent_trad: 公司計劃下半年推出新產品。
pinyin: Gōngsī jìhuà xiàbànnián tuīchū xīn chǎnpǐn.
english: The company plans to launch a new product in the second half of the year.

sent_simp: 救援人员在现场设立了临时指挥部。
sent_trad: 救援人員在現場設立了臨時指揮部。
pinyin: Jiùyuán rényuán zài xiànchǎng shèlì le línshí zhǐhuībù.
english: Rescue workers set up a temporary command post at the scene.

sent_simp: 他明天要去面见公司的总裁。
sent_trad: 他明天要去面見公司的總裁。
pinyin: Tā míngtiān yào qù miànjiàn gōngsī de zǒngcái.
english: He is going to meet the company's president in person tomorrow.
